description.p: A modern application store for managing Flatpak applications.

screenshot.caption: Main application window showing start page
search functionality in the home view
Modal for install an specific application

ul.li: Images now load up to 3x faster thanks to a full rewrite of the image caching system, moving processing to the native backend and reducing redundant network requests.
Switched to TanStack Router, enabling proper URL-based navigation — you can now deep-link directly to apps, categories, and developer pages.
App icons now display with transparent backgrounds, giving the interface a cleaner and more polished look.
Improved app verification: Klia Store now correctly distinguishes between manually uploaded GitHub release assets and auto-generated archives, providing more accurate integrity information.
Various internal code quality improvements to keep the app stable and maintainable.
